subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is no God but Him, and He Who speaketh is verily the Hidden Mystery and the Name whereby [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق انه لهو السر المکنون و الاسم الذی به
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment
